title: RWA network Pharos lands a $1 billion valuation in $44M funding round ahead of mainnet debut
message_html: RWA network Pharos lands a $1 billion valuation in $44M funding round ahead of mainnet debut ...

title: Canton Network powers real-time collateral movement with Transcend
message_html: Canton Network powers real-time collateral movement with Transcend ...
snippet: Transcend, a leader in collateral and liquidity optimization technology, announced it has connected to the Canton Network to enable real-time mobility of tokenized assets.

title: White House Says Stablecoin Rewards Won't Impact Community Banks
message_html: White House Says Stablecoin Rewards Won't Impact Community Banks ...
snippet: White House economists say a stablecoin rewards ban would not meaningfully impact community banks.
